sections.title: Proof by deduction
sections.content: Understand and use the structure of mathematical proof, proceeding from given assumptions through a series of logical steps to a conclusion; use methods of proof stated below.

sections.title: Proof by exhaustion
sections.content: Proof by exhaustion: verifying a statement by checking all possible cases.

sections.title: Disproof by counter-example
sections.content: Disproof by counter-example: finding one example where the statement does not hold.

sections.title: Algebraic division and the factor and remainder theorems
sections.title_zh: 代数除法、因式定理与余式定理
sections.content: Simple algebraic division; use of the factor theorem and remainder theorem. Division by (ax + b) or (ax - b). Fully factorise cubic expressions.

chapters.title: Coordinate Geometry in the (x, y) Plane

sections.title: Equation of a circle
sections.content: Coordinate geometry of the circle using the equation of a circle in the form $(x-a)^2 + (y-b)^2 = r^2$, including use of: (i) the angle in a semicircle is a right angle, (ii) the perpendicular from the centre to a chord bisects the chord, (iii) the perpendicularity of radius and tangent.

sections.title: Recurrence relations and iterations
sections.content: Sequences including those given by a formula for the nth term and those generated by a simple relation of the form $x_{n+1} = f(x_n)$. Increasing sequences, decreasing sequences and periodic sequences.

sections.title: Arithmetic and geometric sequences and series
sections.title_zh: 等差与等比数列及级数
sections.content: Understand and work with arithmetic sequences and series, including the formulae for the nth term and the sum of a finite arithmetic series; the sum of the first n natural numbers. Understand and work with geometric sequences and series including the formulae for the nth term and the sum of a finite geometric series; the sum to infinity of a convergent geometric series, including the use of $|r| < 1$.

sections.title: Sigma notation
sections.content: Use of sigma notation for sums of arithmetic and geometric series.

sections.title: The binomial expansion
sections.content: Binomial expansion of $(a + bx)^n$ for positive integer $n$. Finding coefficients, using expansions to evaluate numbers raised to a power.

sections.title: Exponential functions and graphs
sections.content: $y = a^x$ and its graph, where $a$ is positive.

sections.title: Laws of logarithms
sections.content: Laws of logarithms: $\log_a(xy) = \log_a x + \log_a y$, $\log_a(x/y) = \log_a x - \log_a y$, $\log_a x^k = k\log_a x$, $\log_a a = 1$.

sections.title: Solving exponential equations
sections.content: The solution of equations of the form $a^x = b$.

sections.title: Solving trigonometric equations
sections.content: Solution of simple trigonometric equations in a given interval. Including quadratic trigonometric equations and equations involving multiple angles.

sections.title: Maxima, minima and stationary points
sections.content: Applications of differentiation to maxima and minima and stationary points, increasing and decreasing functions. Use of second derivative to determine the nature of stationary points.

sections.title: Definite integrals
sections.content: Evaluation of definite integrals. Finding areas bounded by curves and lines.

sections.title: Area under a curve
sections.content: Interpretation of the definite integral as the area under a curve. Areas between curves and lines, including consideration of regions above and below the x-axis.

sections.title: The trapezium rule
sections.content: Approximation of area under a curve using the trapezium rule. Understanding when the trapezium rule gives an overestimate or an underestimate.
